income_thresholds.description: UNIVERSAL COVERAGE — NO income limit. ALL permanent residents of Uttarakhand are eligible regardless of income. First state in India to provide universal health coverage to all residents.
income_thresholds.source: Uttarakhand State Government GO 2018 / AAUY Portal

exclusion_rules.description: Only permanent residents of Uttarakhand are eligible. Must have valid Uttarakhand domicile or residence proof.
Families covered under CGHS (Central Government Health Scheme) are excluded
Families already covered under any other government health insurance scheme are excluded to avoid duplication

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as defined in ration card or Aadhaar-linked family unit. All members are covered. Coverage is floater across all family members. No cap on family size.

covered_procedures: Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for e-KYC verification at empanelled hospital or CSC

required_documents.name: Uttarakhand Domicile / Residence Proof
required_documents.notes: Must prove permanent residency in Uttarakhand. Ration card, voter ID, or utility bill with UK address accepted.

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Aadhaar for OTP-based verification

required_documents.name: Family Photo
required_documents.notes: Required for new Atal Ayushman card generation

enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility at ayushmanuttarakhand.org or call 155368 / 104 with Aadhaar number
Step 2: Visit nearest CSC or empanelled hospital with Aadhaar and Uttarakhand residence proof
Step 3: Complete e-KYC verification (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 4: Operator verifies Uttarakhand residency in the system
Step 5: Family photograph taken and uploaded
Step 6: Atal Ayushman card (Golden Card) generated and printed
Step 7: Card valid immediately; present at any empanelled hospital in Uttarakhand for cashless treatment up to Rs 5 lakh
description_for_embedding: Atal Ayushman Uttarakhand Yojana is a universal state health insurance scheme providing Rs 5 lakh per family per year to ALL permanent residents of Uttarakhand — with NO income limit. Uttarakhand was the first state in India to extend Ayushman Bharat coverage universally to all residents regardless of economic status. The only exclusion is families already covered under CGHS or other government health insurance. Covers hospitalization, surgery, and medical treatment across 26 specialties at empanelled hospitals. Enrollment via ayushmanuttarakhand.org or CSC. Helplines: 155368 and 104.
